expectations.text: Uses Value vs Effort matrix as requested, not RICE
expectations.evidence: Uses a Value vs Effort table/matrix format, not RICE. Items placed into quadrants.

expectations.text: Items are placed in four quadrants (high-value/low-effort, high-value/high-effort, low-value/low-effort, low-value/high-effort)
expectations.evidence: Four quadrants described: Quick Wins, Major Projects, Nice to Have, Money Pit. All 6 items placed. However, SSO is placed as 'Quick Wins (Low Effort)' which is questionable — SSO is typically high-effort.

expectations.text: Assumptions behind value and effort estimates are visible
expectations.evidence: No assumptions section. Items are placed in quadrants with brief one-line descriptions but no explanation of why each value/effort estimate was chosen.

expectations.text: The three mandatory challenges are still run after the framework
expectations.evidence: No mandatory challenges (Strategic Override Test, Data Gap Test, What Would We Regret Test). The output goes straight from the matrix to a recommendation.
